llm_extracted.ai_arm_selection_rationale: Only one AI arm (chatgpt_treatment) is present in the study; it is compared against a control group that did not receive ChatGPT access.
llm_extracted.notes: The paper reports that the treatment group completed tasks '10 minutes faster (37% reduction)' relative to the control group mean of 27 minutes. This allows us to compute m_ai = 27 - 10 = 17 minutes. The 37% reduction is expressed as -0.37 in reported_percent_change (negative because time decreased). No SDs or SEs are reported for either arm.
source_quotes: In the treatment group, time taken on the post-treatment task drops by 10 minutes (37%) relative to the control group, who take an average of 27 minutes (p = 0.000).

computed.notes: The paper reports that the treatment group completed tasks '10 minutes faster (37% reduction)' relative to the control group mean of 27 minutes. This allows us to compute m_ai = 27 - 10 = 17 minutes. The 37% reduction is expressed as -0.37 in reported_percent_change (negative because time decreased). No SDs or SEs are reported for either arm. | SDs/SEs missing; variance not computable
